prompt: Subject: The Seeker of Memories, a cute but uneasy chibi deckbuilder hero holding a broken notebook and marker pen. Composition: simple centered sticker-like full-body character sprite on transparent background, readable at small size. Style: modern Japanese pop street-graffiti chibi character design with clean digital marker rendering. Color rules: at least 7 distinct clashing colors, intentionally mismatched and visually disruptive. Character rules: oversized head, tiny simplified body, very large eyes occupying more than 50% of the face, symbolic pupils shaped like torn notebook labels. Line and rendering: thick marker-style strokes, bold outer contour, flat solid fills, line colors belong to the palette and are not black-only. Avoid: fine linework, realistic anatomy, realistic lighting, painterly rendering, watercolor textures, marker streaks, ink bleeding, soft airbrush blending, excessive accessories, overly detailed clothing, complex background, elegant harmonious palette, glossy anime eyes, watermark, text.

Character rules: oversized head, tiny body, very large eyes over 50% of face, lightning-bolt pupils. Thick marker strokes, bold outer contour, flat fills, non-black-only line colors. Avoid realistic anatomy, painterly rendering, soft blending, detailed clothing, text, watermark.
